name: Estelle Yancey
abstract: Estelle "Mama" Yancey (January 1, 1896 – April 19, 1986) was an American blues singer. She was nominated four times for Blues Music Awards as Traditional Blues Female Artist.

concerts.label: Kid Ory and His Creole Jazz Band

works.t: Make Me a Pallet on the Floor

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Goin' to Chicago

about_quotes.speaker: Ernest "Punch" Miller
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee discusses Tampa Red extensively. Mama Yancey is mentioned by the interviewer solely in the context of her nickname for Tampa Red ('Mrs. Tampa').
